programmes.show_description: Episode Three features performances from CHALK, Miles Kane, Annie-Dog & Travy
The fabulous Babatunde Aleshe introduces Chloe Petts and Lindsey Santoro to the stage.
Programmes Start 12:20.
Cash feels the pressure from both sides, worrying that he's doing harm by lying to Eden, but knowing he made a promise to Remi to keep the tumour a secret.
Kerrie catches Dana in a whirlwind of emotions, and in her vulnerable state, Dana finally opens up to her a little, sharing about her struggles with Sonny.
Two strangers celebrating their birthdays in the same restaurant end up having each other's wish granted. Romantic fantasy, starring Emily Tennant and Jake Foy.
It's Week 8, and the remaining sewers celebrate the diva with a fringed dress, animal print and a stage outfit for their favourite performer.
Skunks and Llamas: Emily and Victoria assist Dr. Summers with an alpaca birth; Frank and Patel visit Frank's dad.
The latest news and updates from the UEFA Champions League.
Wales v Italy (Kick-off 4.40pm). Coverage of both teams' fifth and final match of the championship, held at Principality Stadium.
France v England (Kick-off 8.10pm). All the action from the final match of the championship, held at Stade de France.
A father and his teenage daughters are hunted by a massive rogue lion in the savanna. Action thriller, starring Idris Elba.

programmes.show_name: HerrHausen - The Banker and the Bomb
programmes.show_description: Herrhausen relentlessly pursued his grand vision, centralizing Deutsche Bank's core in Frankfurt and pushing for digitalization.
Programmes Start at 12:15.
Everything is on the line as A-Troupe band together to dance their best for the internationals re-adjudication.
The stories making the headlines during the past seven days.
Abigail and Mali walk together on the beach, and Abigail tallies up their score on the magazine compatibility test.
Lacey runs into Tane and decides to fill him in on what's happening with Jo, since her sister hasn't made any effort to reach out to him herself.
Lexie's plans to hold a successful clan gathering are thwarted when Charles MacDonald interferes.
Lexie's estranged father shows up at Glenbogle, and charms everyone with his far-fetched stories.

Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance.
Mysterious Forces: The work of scientists as they investigate the advantages of swarm intelligence, hoping to understand the organised chaos and intelligence of natural groups.
Forests: Forests are the most effective carbon pumps on Earth, but only when they're functioning well and rich in species. Meet people working to improve biodiversity.

programmes.show_name: Once Upon a Time in Tsavo
programmes.show_description: A Time of Plenty: Dust, sand and blistering heat - it's dry season in Tsavo. The drought makes life difficult. This episode shows how the rare, but heavy rains, affect Kenyan ecosystem.
Wicky heads to a stately home to clean up after the sad demise of an estate agent. He's expecting to get a taste of how the other half live.
Joanne Cantwell is joined by Enda McGinley and Paul Flynn for highlights and analysis of the weekend's Allianz League action.
